author: Amit R
text:
The place appears nice with a fun and casual vibe. The concept is self service, with affordable prices and nice food.
However, the place was pretty empty and depressing. There was only one server at the till and ordering one round of beer meant having to wait in a line every time. The tables outside were filthy and when we asked for one to be cleaned the server gave us paper towels to clean it ourselves.
The food was a joke. The tiny portion of "fries" were not fresh and cold. Sausage buns were stale. I had to wait in line to get ketchup because they don't supply bottles.

author: Kevin Wood
text:
The local beer was very good, I have eaten here a few times:
Fish and chips, well not bad I guess, had about 5 fish strips with chips.
Went for the Gourmet burger but was a bit dry.
Service can be a bit slow as they can't cope with so many people at a time like a rush hour weekend.

author: Oren Tocker
text:
Nice location,
Not good service and food,
And serving with dirty glasses.
A place that might not survive if it was in a different location because it is not good enough to attract crowed by its benefits or may i say lack of benefits.

So its there in the Marina and you might order from it, be annoyed by yhe bad service and dirty glasses but you would probably never go to it if it was far.

author: Yosef Kassabry
text: Are you a beer enthusiast exploring Marina Bay? Look no further than Lager and Ale. With more than 40 affordable and tasty beers available, this spot is a top choice for many. Although they serve food, their speciality is the beer. If you're hungry, try the corned beef instead of the burger. Remember that the portions are small for the price, and it's a self-service restaurant. However, for the beer lovers between us, Lager and Ale is a must-visit destination.

author: I Berezner
text:
Lager & Ale nails the English pub vibe with 20+ rotating drafts ÔÇô Pilsners, IPAs, stouts at crazy low prices (NIS 15 thirds, 20 half liters), selfÔÇæservice order/pay/ grab system so no waiter waits.

Street food hits like roast beef sandwiches, cold cuts platters, burgers keep it simple but tasty. Outdoor communal tables buzzing till late (kitchen ~midnight, bar later), perfect for groups. Beer heaven on a budget!

author: Shahar Bohadana
text: Amazing bar. Very low priced self service bar with many beers, lots of great street food, beautifull location on the Herzliya Marine. Don't miss the Ara'is dish. Beer is very fresh, starts from 12nis!

author: April Chan
text:
This place should just cancel their food options and just stick to 'Larger and Ale'.

The first time we ordered food, the barman forgot to put it into the computer system. We sat and waited 15mins before going back and realizing the order was never put in. When the 'fish and chips' finally came, the fish was, in fact, fish fingers. We asked for a replacement as this was not what we were expecting at all for 52 shekels. Then came the mini hotdog, which was in fact a sausage in a square bun. As someone who doesn't particularly have a large mouth, I had to take bites from one side with no sausage in it..

Two stars for a good variety of beers and good prices.

author: yonatan asher
text: They have a nice line of beers but They charge 5Ôé¬  if you want to taste one. Never happened to me before

author: Michael Lenivtsev
text:
London cover concept bar -  beer, self service.
Variations of craft and battle beers, street/beer food at affordable prices!!!
Atmosphere is very comfortable and music adding right wibe.
The reason why not 5 stars - not cleaning tables fast enough.

author: D H
text: Highly disappointed with the service at the bar. The bartender insisted that patrons stand in front of him to place a reorder rather than taking orders from guests seated at the bar. This practice is both inconvenient and disruptive to the customer experience. I hope management addresses this issue to ensure a more professional and accommodating service.

author: Yair Maister
text: A wide variety of tap beers is praiseworthy, decent prices.

author: Alex Berman
text: Good service, very nice fresh beer at good prices. The food looks good although we haven't had a chance to taste it. Lots of sitting places so you don't get claustrophobic like in many other places in the are. Highly recommended.

author: Jyoti SINGH
text:
- Self Service
- Lots of options of beer
- Amazing staff
- Must Try - fish and chips

author: Zeev Zalessky
text: Nice place. Reasonable prices. Good beer and food

author: Benji Sultan
text: Nice place. Looking good. Large selection of beers. The food is ok, not something wow. Very easy street food . Self service

author: Alex Zlidin
text: Very convinient to pickup quick beer and great choice, tasty burger and fish&chips

author: Amik
text:
Food is good, prices are good but service is the worst . Specially when the owner think he can shout on customers when food is not ready after more than half an hourÔÇª pity
Ill not come back, you decide for yourself if you want to promote such behavior from a business. There are other good alternatives

author: P├®ter Nagy
text: Beautiful bar, nice interior, affordable prices and the music is perfect!

author: Eugene Sokolenko
text: Great choice of draft beers and cheap. Many snacks. Great location with view on Marina Herzeliya

author: yuri daich
text: Recommend to visit for beer or ail. Good choice of bears

author: Vitus Flemming
text:
So-so... Many beer labels, unfortunately many of them are very similar and the more interesting ones aren't on the menu.
The menu is good, but totally ignorant of a tourist's need to the extent that several items are only presented in Hebrew - go figure.
Service is - as with the majority of the places I went to - virtually non-existing. If you didn't ask, well tough, it is absolutely your problem that you didn't know that there are 3 types of sausage to chose from for the Hotdog (just an example - I can go on for pages).
Service is also slow and unfocused. If you're polite you can easily wait 5 minutes while the bartender and waiters talk amongst themselves.
Food is okay, nothing special.
Your choice to go or not...

author: Omry Yeshurun
text: The burger wasn't great

author: Felix
text: Plenty of beer, both Israeli and imported. I wish they have more branches (there's one more at Tel Aviv). It would be great to have more food options. Prices are reasonable (for Israeli market). Advice for management: need to put more attention of the cleanliness outside. Other than that - well done!

author: Natalie Rogozhan
text: Wonderful view on the marina, cheap beer, delicious nachos. Everything you need for a great evening.

author: Jhonatan Soto
text: Amazing place! They have a lot of varieties of beer and delicious food. If you are visiting the marina, this place is a must.

author: Gerry Coaklin
text: Shocking service I waited over 15 minutes just to put my food order in. When I complained I got huge attitude from what turned out to be the manager.  The food when it eventually came was really bad quality for the price. Tables not cleared and cleaned properly. Last night ordered Gin and Tonic, sorry we have no Tonic! Probably one of the  most popular cocktail drinks  in the world . I was told the manager forgot to order and replenish the mixer stock. Good management definitely lacking in an establishment in a prime position on the marina. Beer not bad but not worth waiting for when they are busy. This place could be so much better.

author: Chen Almog
text:
Large variety of drinks with some of the cheapest prices I've seen at a bar in Israel. Food not as cheap, but is fine.
They have a system in which they text you when the food is ready and you pick it up yourself.
Overall we had a good time here and will be back.

author: Lea
text:
One of my new favorite spots. The beer is great and affordable. The only thing that needs improvement is the food but otherwise love it.

Pro-tip: go to McDonaldÔÇÖs in the mall to buy food and then enjoy it with the beer.

author: Or Zor
text:
Great service, a variety of beer and alcohol drinks at good prices (probably the best you'll find around this part).

Also parking is super close, at the Marina parking.

Overall very good place to hang out!

author: Tim B
text: Extremely cheap bar right by the Herzliya Marina. The food is always kind of average, but the huge variety of fresh drinks together with fast and nice service, it makes it one of the best bars in Herzliya and in the center region.

author: Tomer Spector
text: If you come here in the busy hours expect to wait a very long time until you could sit at a table, and the lack of any organized sitting only makes it worse. But when you finally find that precious table you will be overwhelmed by the variety of the beers this place had to offer and their cheap price tag, but anyone looking for something other to drink should look for another place, the bartenders appear to not know anything regarding drinks that aren't beers and there's no menu. The food section looked promising but when I came to order I was told that most dishes aren't served (was it specific to the night I was? Either way having no food on a Friday night does seem odd and disappointing). In conclusion the long wait, disappointing drinks and questionable service all led to me leaving with a bitter taste in my mouth, and not just because the poor drink I got, but if you want a cheap and good beer and don't mind waiting I will recommend this place

author: Shai Lottem
text: Great prices, cool music, nice atmosphere. Excellent service.

author: jean mvo
text: Nice place, lots of beers. I personally don't like their fingerfood, very salty and fat. I had fish and chips... In one word disappointing. But if you stay with the beers and good company you ll have a great time

author: Lin M.
text:
Good VFM here.
But a lot of beer options from the menu are constantly missing on the taps.
Food is ok.
Nice service usually.
Lovely atmosphere, but don't expect too much.

author: Inna Bela
text:
Amazing!!!! Lots of different beers! Very good prices. The most expensive beer are 21 nis!!! Around 5Ôé¼
Snacks are tasty and cheap as well.
Good vibe with the breeze of the sea
Strongly recommend

author: Evyatar Cohen
text: The food was horrible !!! DonÔÇÖt you dare to order food here only drinks!

author: Alice Roth
text: Cheap beer, large variety but food could be much better

author: Omer Vertman
text: Large selection of beers and some food to eat with

author: Gil Percik
text:
Great select of beers from around the world and great bar food as well.
I've tried the burgers, Cuban sandwich and corned beef sandwich and they were all delish. Great affordable prices for food as well as drinks. Highly recommended ­ƒì║­ƒì║­ƒì║

author: Zvi Aran
text: At the Herzlia Marina. One of the less expensive pubs with a good choice of beers. A limited choice of dishes during week days, A larger choice during the weekend (Thursday-Saturday). A pleasant environment.

author: Eyal Sharon
text: Great food & selection of beer. Side fries are perfect.

author: isaac gottlib
text: Best beer in the town. Around 20 beer variety.great offers.

author: Roey Pinkas
text: Good vibes. Convenient prices.

author: Shenhav Ovadia
text: Nice bar with a variety of snacks and beautiful marina view. The atmosphere is  nice as well as the service. Reaaonable prices. Keep up the good job!

author: Bhruti Parmar
text:
The place is okay compared to neighboring restaurants. The service sucks and you have to go serve your self which is pathetic for a restaurant in the upscale area.
Food was just okay nothing to rave about and lacks variety. Beer selections are also parse for a lager and ale joint.
Don't recommend this place.

author: Dmitrii Simakov
text: Best beer choice in Israel! Simple menu, but all you need - its a good pint of cold beer ­ƒñƒ­ƒÿÇ

author: Oren Vilner
text:
Best as they could.
Very good prices for their beers, and the food is great.

author: Sharon Solomon
text: Nice place on the beach. Drinks are good and decently priced. Food is kinda costly but overall much better than the crowded coffee shops.

author: Leonid Fonaryov
text: Many sorts of draft beer, not expensive

author: Evgeny Tzeluk
text:
Nice place seat with friends.
Atmosphere,music good.large choice of beers and nice portions of foods for a beer.

author: Helle Garber
text: Bad service. Food nothing to write home about. Beer good. It was Thursday 20 o,clock  and there was a DJ and the music was sooo loud. Not a cosy and comfy place.

author: Jimmy D.
text: Great selection of beer and drinks! Will not disappoint. Located at the pier so great people watching too.

author: Mikhael Serebro
text: Lovely place with reasonable price of beers variety

author: Prof Dror Sagi
text: Excellent food, very cheap prices, huge variety of beers and other alcoholic drinks, friendly staff, homely atmosphere. Lager & Ale you are the best.

author: Yossi Levy
text: Basic bar food, GOOD beer selections, no services but very fair prices. Toilets need more attention.

author: Tali Rotem
text: Great place. Lovely atmosphere. Very good prices, big selection of beers. Ok food. Friendly but very slow service.

author: Eran Markus
text: Try the veal sausage sandwich, perfect with mustard and Sauerkraut. Nice variety of Israeli/Belgian beers

author: Didi Dotan
text: My new favorite place in the Marina met there with friends about 4 times. Kids ate there every day.

author: Joe Uziel
text: Finally a place in Israel where you can pay a decent price for alcohol!!!! Thats the bottom line, 21 NIS for half a liter of beer.

author: Daniella Segal
text: Great place fun to sit and incredible collection of beers. Wish there were a better selection of food beyojd snacks.

author: avigail blumenson
text: Everything is self-service, which makes the place extremely cheep, the bartenders are nice and kind, and it's fun sitting and drinking

author: Ofer
text: Large beer selection. Nice street food. Fair prices. Nice sunset above the marina.

author: David Sutton
text: Self service. Cheap beer, huge selection and good music. Perfect spot to knock a few beers with friends.

author: Gal Yaniv
text: Nice location with great prices, amazing food but the burger that was a bit dry and not proportionate with the bun, besides that - recommended!

author: Tomer Bitan
text: Great spot for a beer, very cheap, takes about long to order. New burger is really nice

author: Alex Komraz
text: One of the best places in the area. Big place  with Self service, good food and a lot of beer choices. Heighly recommended.

author: Guillermo Anderson Benaim
text: I would come here everyday. What are those amazing prices for food and beer? And many many many types of beer may I add

author: Petro Fl
text: Nice place for a beer, they have very nice selection of beers on tap. But the food is mediocre.

author: Ron Burshtein
text:
Great location Great beer nice food for reasonable price
But very long line during weekends

author: Michael Shnizer
text: Grate place to spend the evening, I had a burger and a beers, the selection of beers awesome and the prices are right, so It makes sece to order 330ml of different beers.

author: Danko Papo
text: Self service. Big choice of beers at acceptable prices. Plesent and simple environment.

author: Guy Bilitski
text:
Delicious and very nice food and drinks.
Cheap and easy, buy at the cashier and get a seat
Great place!

author: Jeff Klein
text: Avilabilty of items from the menu was limited, staff very helpful. Nice atmosphere & draft beer.

author: Nadav
text: A great place to sit with your friends over a good beer,  and the prices are also very fair.

author: Gennady Sorochan
text: Good choice of beers, very attractive prices, some nice snacks, very good atmosphere - i liked it so much that i've returned few times already.

author: Daniel Leiderman-Gueller
text:
Great atmosphere, good drinks and simple food.
Not many cocktails

author: Doron Maoz
text: Excellent location, basic menu, excellent variety of beers, moderate/high prices.

author: Gal Davidzon
text: Great selection of beers. The food and the alcohol is at great prices. Self service.

author: Itzik Linder
text: Nice place to drink beer and have a bite. A very large selection of draft beer to choose from

author: Andy G.
text: very good food, friendly staff, nice ambient, English menu, what else you need?

author: Glenn
text:
If you
like fast food and a beer or
2 it's a place to visit.

author: Vladimir Vinokur
text: The beer is great - always cold and fresh, but the food could be better.

author: H Chang
text: Beer house next to marina. Good vibe. Outdoor seating.

author: Amalia Stepanian
text: Very nice place and guys who helped us even after we dropped our order onto the floor...))

author: Ruslan Bershadski
text:
Thet was my first time i visit that place.
A lot of tape of beer. The price very low.

author: Yoni Rosen
text: ,great view, great beers, vibe is mehh , but still good place for a beer with a friend or two

author: Tsoof S.
text: Nice place, lots of beer choices, great vegan burger.

author: Ami Levin
text: Very nice place with good variation of beers, comfortable prices and nice food

author: Sharon Feldman
text:
pros
not expensive.
wide variety of drinks.

con
empty - no people.

author: yotam ziv
text:
Decent food , decent selection of beers .
Self serve , great spot on the seafront

author: Igor Langer
text: Nice place with wide beer selection and affordable prices. Food selection not big here

author: Igor Diogen
text:
Nice bar to spend the time with friends,  good location,  nice personal,  not expensive
Recommend to visit

author: Igor Madaniev
text: Great place. Excellent variety of beers, very fair prices

author: Eden Aharon
text: Cheap beer and at the Marine. No waitress's there (also no need for one)

author: Chris
text: Great restaurant with a large selection of beers. The food is AMAZING

author: Oren Breit
text:
Great place
Nice beer collection
And very good price for beer ­ƒì╗

author: David Shohat
text: This is my favorite bar. Good prices, decent food

author: Niv Gal Waizer
text: Low cost bear. Huge variety of bears.bad service. Long queue.

author: Omri Goldstein
text: Great beer selection with the cheapest prices in the country. Love it!

author: Dor Bp
text:
Great beer, great munchfood.
Best value for price in the region
